svg.text: CRO Browser Agent - Configuration & Type System
Configuration Hierarchy, Agent Options, and TypeScript Interfaces

g.text: # Headless mode with custom output directory
headless=false timeout=60000 maxSteps=10 output=['console'] model='gpt-4' temp=0.3
new CROAgent({ url, headless: true, maxSteps: 15, outputFormats: ['markdown'] })
check_navigation | find_friction | scroll_page | click | go_to_url | record_insight | done
CROAgentOptions -> PageState -> DOMTree/DOMNode -> CROInsight[] -> Hypothesis[] -> CROScore -> CROAnalysisResult
